name: KRITIS / NIS2 Critical Infrastructure Analysis
description: Strict availability analysis for KRITIS-regulated and NIS2 essential entities. Applies elevated thresholds reflecting regulatory availability requirements. TLS validity is a mandatory control.
rational: BSI-KritisV and NIS2 Directive require demonstrable availability of critical infrastructure web presence. 95% GRN threshold reflects the expectation that essential entities are continuously reachable. Any degradation below 85% constitutes an incident requiring documentation.
standard: BSI-KritisV §10 / EU NIS2 Directive 2022/2555 Art.21 / IOF-ANALYSIS-v1
controls: TLS certificate validity must be checked
Latency above critical threshold triggers AMB regardless of availability count
Any node classified as essential (criticality >= 4) must individually respond
